scenario.name: Simple appointment scheduling
scenario.goal: Schedule a routine appointment for next week.
details: The patient prefers Tuesday or Thursday morning.
The patient can provide their date of birth if asked.
The patient should ask one follow-up question about appointment prep.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes, but Espanol.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'd like to schedule a routine appointment for next week, preferably on Tuesday or Thursday morning.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Good AI. My speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'd like to schedule a routine appointment for next week, preferably on Tuesday or Thursday morning.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, my date of birth is March 15, 1985.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Just to confirm you'd like to book a general office, visit for routine care next week, preferably Tuesday or Thursday morning is that correct?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that's correct. Either Tuesday or Thursday morning works best for me.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I found morning openings next week on Wednesday, July 1st. There's a 10:00 a.m. slot with Dr. Zbigniew lucasi and 11 a.m. or 11:30 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I really need Tuesday or Thursday if possible. Do you have any morning slots available on those days?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'm sorry, could you repeat that? I didn't catch what you said about Tuesday or Thursday.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: To say something. Would you like to hear about Thursday morning, openings?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, please, Thursday morning would be great. What times are available?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Heroes, Thursday morning options, 900 a.m. or 10:00 a.m. with Dr. Zig moo lukovski or 10 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble, would you like to book 1 of these?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, the 9 a.m. slot on Thursday with Dr. Zbigniew Lucasi sounds good. Also, is there anything I should do to prepare before the appointment?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Your appointment is set for Thursday July 2nd at 9:00 a.m. with Dr. Zigni lucasi at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Great, thank you for booking that. And just to clarify, is there anything I need to do beforehand, like fasting or bringing any medical records?
